research_question: Does removing trend_consistency_20d_raw from v15 produce a cleaner two-signal price-volume family that preserves v15's broad edge while improving head extraction robustness and reducing drawdown fragility?

feature_set.interpretation: stronger medium-term momentum should rank higher
improving recent liquidity versus medium-term liquidity should rank higher

score_family_contract.score_rule: mean(percentile_rank(momentum_60_5_raw DESC), percentile_rank(liquidity_trend_20_60_raw DESC)); require min_feature_count >= 2
score_family_contract.missing_data_rule: Only score rows with both retained features ranked and non-null; otherwise emit null model_score_D0 and preserve the row for audit.

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated v7 0.70 ranking liquidity guard and same TopK=10 width as used by v15
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same equal-weight daily Top10 extraction used by calibrated v7 and v15

motivation_from_component_diagnosis: Removing trend_consistency_20d_raw from v15 improved full_sample_corr_ic(全样本IC), avg_daily_ic(平均日IC), positive_daily_ic_share(正IC日占比), and avg_label_top10(前10平均标签).
Removing trend_consistency_20d_raw also slightly lowered the top-slice low-liquidity proxy, while momentum_60_5_raw and liquidity_trend_20_60_raw remained the stronger broad-edge contributors.
disallowed_changes: Do not remove or weaken liquidity_trend_20_60_raw inside this round.
Do not reintroduce trend_consistency_20d_raw through any weighting or extraction adjustment.
Do not include any rejected atomic signal from rr_price_volume_single_signal_discovery_20260422.
Do not include the borderline momentum_120_20 candidate.
Do not change the calibrated v7 liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, or turnover-suppression changes inside this round.
Do not sweep multiple family compositions or aggregation formulas inside this round.
notes: This is the first strict ablation challenger built off v15.
The goal is not to search broadly again, but to test whether dropping the weakest diagnosed component is enough to improve robustness without giving back the relative-return gains observed in v15.
